---
lang: en
date-meta: now
params:
  startYear: NULL
  endYear: NULL
  nPatients: NULL
  hospitalName: NULL
  signatory: NULL
  signatureImagePath: NULL
  dataFilePath: NULL
  departmentCode: NULL
  dhis2Scheme: NULL
  dhis2Hostname: NULL
  dhis2Port: NULL
  dhis2Path: NULL
---

```{r}
#| label: Initialise Locale
Sys.setenv(LC_ALL = "en_GB.UTF-8")
```

{{< include _content.qmd >}}
